items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the eligibility rules related to invoice status and amount thresholds. However, there is no direct evidence provided that confirms whether these eligibility rules are satisfied or not. The linked use case mentions the need for eligibility rules, but the prior steps do not include any checks or confirmations related to these rules, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
